creator: leo9641@yandex.ru
text:
https://github.com/pyca/cryptography/issues/10845

The metadata for pyOpenSSL 23.2.0 indicates it requires cryptography<42:

https://inspector.pypi.io/project/pyopenssl/23.2.0/packages/be/df/75a6525d8988a89aed2393347e9db27a56cb38a3e864314fac223e905aef/pyOpenSSL-23.2.0.tar.gz/pyOpenSSL-23.2.0/setup.py#line.102

You should either upgrade your version of pyOpenSSL (recommended) or downgrade cryptography (not recommended).
